# Ender Dandul — Official Website

> Official website of Ender Dandul, Turkish painter, sculptor, and visual artist based in Istanbul.

## About Ender Dandul

Ender Dandul is a Turkish painter, sculptor, and visual artist whose surrealist works explore mythology, fairy tales, and the human condition. A graduate of the Istanbul State Academy of Fine Arts (now Mimar Sinan Fine Arts University), Dandul began his artistic journey in the early 1970s. After fourteen years as art director at a publishing house, he devoted himself fully to painting in 1986. Over the course of 39 solo exhibitions, his work has traveled from Turkey to the United Kingdom and Switzerland. He has taught at Beykent, Halic, ITU, and Isik University.

## Artistic Style

Dandul creates works close to the surrealist painting style. For him, line is the foundation of painting, and his color palette shifts in harmony with his inner rhythm. His canvases explore themes of cyclicality, local traditions, interpersonal communication, and the fragmentation of the self. His recent works use acrylic and mixed media on canvas and cardboard.

## Latest Exhibition

39th Solo Exhibition (24 March – 6 April 2026) at Ada Galeri, Nisantasi, Istanbul. Address: Valikonagi Caddesi, Fulya Sokak, No.3. Phone: +90 (212) 296 26 81.

## Next Exhibition

40th Solo Exhibition — date and location to be announced.
